name: Web3 - Echo Vault
description:
Deploy instance with 10 Finney
We've built a futuristic, unhackable yield vault that generates massive returns. We've even implemented a flash-loan system to allow arbers to utilize idle capital, strictly verifying that the contract's balance is kept whole.
Can you make off with the vault's funds?
Objective: Drain the EchoVault so its final balance is 0.
